name: Patty Garcia
data_note: Limited public information available. Check your county clerk's office or the Illinois State Board of Elections for filing info.
bio: Patty Garcia is listed as the Democratic candidate filed for IL-04 in 2026 after Rep. Chuy Garcia's retirement announcement. Public election reporting identifies her as part of the open-seat field. (Source: Shaw Local candidate list, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)
